questions.scenario: A new Orders import VM boots but the worker process never starts. Which evidence belongs in the first review?

options.text: Startup script output and the process manager status.

questions.explanation: VM startup and process management explain how the server becomes useful.

questions.scenario: A startup script installs packages and writes config. Why should it be treated like production code?

options.text: A failed script can leave a VM running but not serving the app.
It only changes the billing account name.
It replaces the need for logs.

questions.explanation: Startup automation is part of the runtime path for a VM.

questions.scenario: Which details belong in startup evidence?
questions.explanation: Startup evidence should let a teammate reconstruct how the VM became the app server.
